retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the function is a cleanup routine that always iterates over all VCCs; failure is not applicable.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to clean up all VCCs belonging to a device during device removal. Iterates over hash table, matches VCCs, calls vcc_release_async (non-refcount cleanup) and then sk_del_node_init (a put). The refcount operation is one part of a broader cleanup loop with significant non-refcount logic (iteration, matching, async release). Does not return any reference-counted object to the caller.
